last_watch_note.title: Note: The Last Watch scroll drops from Wither Skeletons (8% chance) — farm skulls, watch for the scroll

subtitle.text: Three Wither Skeleton skulls. One Wither. The Last Watch scroll drops from the skeleton, not the Wither.

description: They carry two things of value:
and the Last Watch scroll (8% chance).
└ Not from the Wither itself — from the skeletons
└ Content: the vigil tradition — standing watch
over the dying and the dead,
└ Lore: the Wither is not a creature,
└ Ch11 The Wither is a separate, harder fight
└ Slow fire rate — manageable with shield
└ Wither Effect on hit: drains health over time
└ Skull drop rate: 2.5% base, improves with Looting
└ Last Watch: 8% — better than skull drop rate
└ ▲ DO NOT summon the Wither yet
└ The Wither in this pack is Wither Reincarnated
└ Multiple phases, AoE attacks, high damage
▸ The skull is the key. The scroll is the reason.
Kill enough of them that you get both.
▶ Note the Last Watch scroll drop [check]
◇ The 3 skulls stay in inventory until Ch11.
